news.headline: ‘French Banksy’ JR starts wrapping Paris’s Pont Neuf bridge in inflatable ‘cave’
news.summary: The Pont Neuf, the oldest bridge in Paris, vanished from sight overnight Thursday as French artist JR, dubbed the "French Banksy" began enveloping the historic structure in an inflatable giant cave. The artwork, "La Caverne du Pont Neuf", is a tribute to a Parisian artistic legend Christo and his wi
